name: elev8er/elev8er-php-sdk
description: Team-scoped public API for elev8er. Authenticate every request with an API key issued per team (`X-API-Key` header). Keys are created and managed from the elev8er panel (Team › API Keys). This API is intended for **server-to-server** use — never expose your API key in a browser or mobile client.  **Rate limiting:** every response includes `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining` and `X-RateLimit-Reset` headers. When the limit is exceeded the API returns `429 Too Many Requests`.
